Offline Privacy Guarantee
This AI Assistant runs queries completely locally via your host CPU/GPU through Ollama.

No spreadsheet details or comments are uploaded to external APIs. Your data remains fully secure.
Hello! I am your local offline AI Assistant. Once you run the consolidation pipeline on your spreadsheet reports, you can ask me questions about your data here (e.g. list major modules with blocked cases, or explain why cases are NA in a specific region).
